title: Trump Lashes Out at Spain: ‘Cut Off All Trade.’ Here’s Why That’s Unlikely.
summary_full: A move against Spain would face political, legal and practical issues and probably provoke a wider trade war with the European Union. It could also roil markets.
summary_public: A move against Spain would face political, legal and practical issues and probably provoke a wider trade war with the European Union. It could also roil markets.
